response.original_title: 🛰️ How Do I Unlock My Kraken Account? Quick Fix Guide
response.overview: If your account on Kraken 📡 is locked, start by resetting your password.[[1 🔥 888 🔥 633 🔥 4176]] Check your email for security alerts that explain the issue. If you still can’t log in, submit a support request.1 ⭐ 888 ⭐ 633 ⭐ 4176 Kraken may require identity confirmation before unlocking your account.1
